title: Create Profile
subtitle: Follow the steps to complete your profile setup.

companyInfo.title: Company Information
companyInfo.description: Fill in the details of the company you wish to register for the service. We use this information to create a login for you.

contactPerson.title: Contact Person
contactPerson.description: We will coordinate the practical details with your contact person and will later need physical access to your facility.

sidebar.point1: Save up to 40% on total energy costs

facility.title: Register Your XRGI System
facility.description: We have now created a login for you and your company. If you do not have the system details, you can always return later.
facility.modelHint: Model name is on your registration form
facility.xrgiIdHint: The ID number is 8 digits and located on the side of the machine.
facility.addressHint: Enter the address of this system's location
facility.contractQuestion: Do you already have a service contract for your system?
facility.wantContractQuestion: Do you want a service contract for your ECPower?
facility.providerNameHint: Enter the name of the service provider
facility.addPerformanceReport: I want to add a performance report
facility.emailHint: (You can enter multiple addresses separated by commas)

Installation.title: Installation
Installation.description: To start saving money on electricity, new software needs to be installed on your system. This software is developed by EC Power and ensures optimal performance while providing explanations on its benefits. The pricing for this service may vary depending on the plan. See the price overview here.
Installation.setupQuestion: Do you want to set up SuperSaverX?
